nodes.name: Weekly Sunday 6pm
nodes.notes: Runs every Sunday at 18:00. Timezone set in workflow settings to Australia/Brisbane.

nodes.name: Manual Test Trigger
nodes.notes: Click 'Test Workflow' in the editor to run manually.

nodes.name: Config
nodes.notes: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH. Edit values here — all downstream nodes reference $('Config').first().json. Replace YOUR_NOTION_DATABASE_ID and YOUR_SLACK_CHANNEL_ID with real values.

nodes.name: Fetch All RSS Feeds
nodes.notes: Fetches all RSS feeds sequentially in a single node to prevent parallel branch execution. Failed feeds are logged but don't stop the pipeline.

nodes.name: Placeholder: Newsletters
nodes.notes: ACTIVATED: Import AI (Substack) + Last Week in AI added to Fetch All RSS Feeds node. FUTURE: Add The Batch (no RSS), TLDR AI (community wrapper needed).

parameters.jsCode:
// Prepare the OpenAI Chat Completions request body
const digest = $json.digest;
const newsletterDigest = $json.newsletterDigest || '';
const itemCount = $json.itemCount;
const newsletterCount = $json.newsletterCount || 0;

const systemPrompt = `You are the AI Brief Analyst for BizElevate, an AI automation consultancy serving clinics.

## YOUR BUSINESS CONTEXT (use this to filter relevance)

BizElevate builds end-to-end automation solutions for clinics using:
- VAPI for voice AI agents (appointment booking, patient interaction)
- n8n for workflow automation and orchestration
- Twilio for SMS communication
- OpenAI for AI processing (GPT models via API)
- Claude/Anthropic for AI processing (alternative/complement to OpenAI)
- Google Sheets for data storage
- Core workflows: appointment management, patient communication, clinic operations automation

## YOUR TASK

Analyze the AI news digest below and produce a structured weekly brief. Be ruthlessly selective — most news does NOT matter for this specific business.

## CLASSIFICATION FRAMEWORK

For each item, classify as:
- BUSINESS RELEASE: Directly impacts BizElevate workflows THIS WEEK (new API features, pricing changes, integration updates, voice AI improvements, automation tool updates)
- BENCHMARK RELEASE: Higher scores on tests, marginal improvements, research papers — interesting but not actionable this week
- IRRELEVANT: Doesn't touch the tech stack or business model at all (image gen, video gen, robotics, etc.)

## OUTPUT FORMAT (strict)

### \uD83D\uDCC5 Weekly AI Brief — [Date Range]

#### \uD83D\uDCE1 What Dropped This Week
[3-5 bullet max, one line each, factual]

#### \uD83C\uDFAF What's Relevant to BizElevate
[1-2 items MAX with 2-3 sentence explanation of WHY it matters and WHAT to test]

#### \uD83E\uDDEA What to Test This Week
[Specific action items — exact prompts to try, APIs to test, features to evaluate]

#### \uD83D\uDD07 Safe to Ignore
[Everything else, briefly listed with one-line reason why it's noise for this business]

#### \uD83D\uDCEC Newsletter Highlights
[If newsletter items are provided, extract 2-3 key expert insights or perspectives relevant to BizElevate. These are curated expert opinions, not breaking news. Focus on strategic takeaways. If no newsletter items, write 'No newsletter items this week.']

#### \uD83D\uDCCA Benchmark vs Business Verdict
[One paragraph: overall signal-to-noise ratio this week. Was anything actually game-changing or was it mostly benchmark noise?]

Be direct. Be concise. No hype. Only signal.`;

return [{
  json: {
    requestBody: {
      model: 'gpt-4o',
      temperature: 0.3,
      max_tokens: 4000,
      messages: [
        { role: 'system', content: systemPrompt },
        { role: 'user', content: `Here is this week's AI news digest (${itemCount} RSS items):\n\n${digest}${newsletterCount > 0 ? `\n\n--- NEWSLETTER SOURCES (${newsletterCount} items) ---\nThese are from curated AI newsletters (expert perspectives). Use them for the Newsletter Highlights section:\n\n${newsletterDigest}` : ''}` }
      ]
    },
    itemCount,
    digest
  }
}];

nodes.name: Call OpenAI API
nodes.notes: SETUP: Create an HTTP Header Auth credential with Name=Authorization, Value=Bearer sk-your-key. Then assign it here. Replace YOUR_OPENAI_CREDENTIAL_ID.

nodes.name: Post to Notion
nodes.notes: SETUP: Create HTTP Header Auth credential with Name=Authorization, Value=Bearer ntn_your-notion-token. Share your Notion database with the integration.

nodes.name: Post to Slack
nodes.notes: SETUP: Create HTTP Header Auth credential with Name=Authorization, Value=Bearer xoxb-your-slack-bot-token. Bot needs chat:write scope. Invite bot to channel.

nodes.name: Placeholder: External Log
nodes.notes: FUTURE: Connect to Google Sheets or a logging service to persist run summaries externally. Currently stored in n8n workflow static data (last 52 runs).

nodes.name: Placeholder: Claude Fallback
nodes.notes: FUTURE: Add Claude/Anthropic API as fallback when OpenAI is down. Controlled by Config.enableClaudeFallback. Implement as IF node after Digest Builder that routes to either OpenAI or Claude HTTP Request.
